---
title: "Introduction"
---

---
title: "Introduction"
source: "https://support.hyland.com/r/Current/Hyland-Intelligent-Document-Processing-IDP/lnw1745229347532"
section: "Hyland Intelligent Document Processing (IDP)"
---

Hyland Intelligent Document Processing (IDP) provides AI-enabled document capture, classification and intelligent data extraction to reliably improve efficiency, accuracy and the speed of document processing. With its prompt-based configuration, you can quickly set up document processing workflows without extensive manual effort. It is deeply integrated into Automate and its orchestration engine to provide end-to-end automation at scale.

It is composed of three main components: ​

- The Studio Modeler application, where professional developers and non-technical power users configure the IDP solution by leveraging AI and automation to streamline the extraction, classification, and processing of unstructured data and configure end to end business workflows that include conditional logic to route documents, trigger actions based on specific criteria, create, update, and release applications.
- The Studio Admin application, where administrators deploy applications, manage user permissions, and monitor deployed applications.
- The Workspace, where end-users can start new content-centric processes, and manage their work.

Key Features

-
AI-enabled document classification, separation, and field extraction

-
Support for multiple document types and formats

-
Configurable workflows for automated processing

-
Integration with external repositories and business applications through Automate

-
User-friendly interface for non-technical users

-
Role-based access control for security and compliance

This document describes the functional capabilities of the IDP Modeler application and outlines steps to configure it.

## User Interface

![](data:image/gif;base64,)
| Name | Description | Location |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Configuration | Includes all elements required to configure an IDP solution. Users can create classes, fields and configure validations here. | Studio Modeler |
| Processing | A workflow engine for document processing that includes workflow steps like document ingestions, classification, separation, field extraction and document export. | Studio Admin |
| Workspace | A central and task-driven tool to enable human-in-the-loop interaction used for classification and extraction review. | Own App |
